response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The video contains spoken dialogue only, matching the absence of vocal music as reported by the log. 2. JSON Usage: Fully transcribed dialogue manually. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are timed to precise speech start/end timestamps, with logical groupings to handle overlaps and maintain pacing.

subtitles.original: Get him! Get him! Get him!
subtitles.english: Get him! Get him! Get him!

subtitles.original: They give a bunch of money.
subtitles.english: They give a bunch of money.

subtitles.original: Yagoo, please! We're kind of homeless, we need this.
subtitles.english: Yagoo, please! We're kind of homeless, we need this.

subtitles.original: Oh, you're homeless? You could have told me!
subtitles.english: Oh, you're homeless? You could have told me!

subtitles.original: No, it's a... it's a reference to the IShowSpeed meme.
subtitles.english: No, it's a... it's a reference to the IShowSpeed meme.

subtitles.original: Please, Yagoo, let us have this.
subtitles.english: Please, Yagoo, let us have this.

subtitles.original: I don't want to be isekai'd as a slime.
subtitles.english: I don't want to be isekai'd as a slime.

subtitles.original: Aren't you already an isekai protagonist? I thought this was your post-isekai life.
subtitles.english: Aren't you already an isekai protagonist? I thought this was your post-isekai life.

subtitles.original: I retired from my isekai life.
subtitles.english: I retired from my isekai life.

subtitles.original: It's like the trope where a hero saves the world in the isekai...
subtitles.english: It's like the trope where a hero saves the world in the isekai...

subtitles.original: ...and then they come back and they're like, "Oh, the world is still dying."
subtitles.english: ...and then they come back and they're like, "Oh, the world is still dying."

subtitles.original: The world became a capitalist world.
subtitles.english: The world became a capitalist world.

subtitles.original: It is. There is never a retirement life for an isekai protagonist, you know that, right?
subtitles.english: It is. There is never a retirement life for an isekai protagonist, you know that, right?

subtitles.original: I just want to fish in the outskirts of town.
subtitles.english: I just want to fish in the outskirts of town.

subtitles.original: I'm okay, I'm okay. This is good for me.
subtitles.english: I'm okay, I'm okay. This is good for me.

subtitles.original: Okay, I'm going to be paying all the gold I earn as a payment for your protection.
subtitles.english: Okay, I'm going to be paying all the gold I earn as a payment for your protection.

subtitles.original: Maybe you shouldn't have asked for protection, because what if I tap you from the back like that, you know?
subtitles.english: Maybe you shouldn't have asked for protection, because what if I tap you from the back like that, you know?

subtitles.original: It's okay, that's what... That's what a hero experiences.
subtitles.english: It's okay, that's what... That's what a hero experiences.

subtitles.original: That's why my hand did that to you.
subtitles.english: That's why my hand did that to you.

subtitles.original: Oh, you want to be the antagonist in this story?
subtitles.english: Oh, you want to be the antagonist in this story?

subtitles.original: If we're enemies, that means I'm like enemies with like two out of three of the Myth.
subtitles.english: If we're enemies, that means I'm like enemies with like two out of three of the Myth.

subtitles.original: But Anya, we're supposed to be perfect partners.
subtitles.english: But Anya, we're supposed to be perfect partners.

subtitles.original: That's true. Oh my god... My memories from my other life!
subtitles.english: That's true. Oh my god... My memories from my other life!

subtitles.original: You have forgotten because you spent countless... countless years in this dungeon alone.
subtitles.english: You have forgotten because you spent countless... countless years in this dungeon alone.

subtitles.original: My head... It's trying to remember something, something from my other life, something about...
subtitles.english: My head... It's trying to remember something, something from my other life, something about...

subtitles.original: I can't. It's not letting me remember.
subtitles.english: I can't. It's not letting me remember.

subtitles.original: Remember Ya-... No, not remember Yagoo.
subtitles.english: Remember Ya-... No, not remember Yagoo.

subtitles.original: Remember Yagoo? Uh, Yagoo? Who is that?
subtitles.english: Remember Yagoo? Uh, Yagoo? Who is that?

subtitles.original: You know that one Re:Zero episode where Rem... Rem forgetting Subaru? That's me right now.
subtitles.english: You know that one Re:Zero episode where Rem... Rem forgetting Subaru? That's me right now.

subtitles.original: Oh, no, no, no, don't worry.
subtitles.english: Oh, no, no, no, don't worry.

subtitles.original: Yeah, but I'm dead right now.
subtitles.english: Yeah, but I'm dead right now.

subtitles.original: Chat literally having flashbacks to yesterday going, "No, don't ruin it!"
subtitles.english: Chat literally having flashbacks to yesterday going, "No, don't ruin it!"
